client_id.description: Navan OAuth2 client-credentials client ID. Used only for the token exchange; never logged.

client_secret.description: Navan OAuth2 client-credentials client secret. Used only for the token exchange; never logged.

base_url.description: Navan API base URL override; the OAuth2 token endpoint (ta-auth/oauth/token) is derived from this same host, matching legacy's derivation. Defaults to production.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound sent as the createdFrom filter; only bookings created at or after this time are read. Optional; omitted entirely on a full sync with no prior cursor.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
